rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header.

rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms 'Soluta Varia' is a header on its own line. gemini-flash correctly identified this row; gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined it with the following entry, classifying it as an 'entry' with an amount.

rows.description: Brot. over
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus (gpt-5-mini had these amounts in its combined row 2). Description 'Brot. over' taken from gemini-flash, which correctly segmented the row.
rows.english_description: Balance brought forward (brought over) carried from the previous page.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance brought forward carried from the previous page, amounting to £307 14s 10d.

rows.description: To I. Smith. for a copy of the portrait of The E. of Shaftesbury, at the Charter House
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description preferred from gemini-flash which accurately captured 'I. Smith' and capitalization as per image ('copy' lowercase, 'The E.' uppercase).
rows.english_description: Payment to I. Smith for a copy of the portrait of the Earl of Shaftesbury (the original at the Charter House).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to I. Smith for a copy of the portrait of the Earl of Shaftesbury at the Charter House, amounting to £3 12s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Wooldrey. One Yrs. Scholarship & Med.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Wooldrey' and '& Med.' (gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Woolley' and 'to Miss D. 1834').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Wooldrey for one year's scholarship and medal.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Wooldrey for one year's scholarship and medal, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Anderson. Do
rows.notes: Consensus between models for amounts and description. Description preferred from gemini-flash for consistent 'Do' notation.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Anderson for one year's scholarship and medal (same as previous entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Anderson for one year's scholarship and medal, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.description: To the SubRector - Supplement of Off. Income
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, matching capitalization and 'SubRector' (gpt-5-mini read 'Sublector').
rows.english_description: Supplementary payment to the Sub-Rector as an addition to official income.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Supplementary payment to the Sub-Rector as an addition to official income, amounting to £3 14s 5d.

rows.description: Do. Improvement of Salary
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Payment for an improvement to the Sub-Rector's salary.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for an improvement to the Sub-Rector's salary, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Lightfoot. for a survey & plan of the Glebe at Wootton, Northamptonshire
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 12 1 0. gemini-flash correctly extracted the amounts. gpt-5-mini misread the amounts as 3 12 0.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Lightfoot for a survey and plan of the glebe at Wootton in Northamptonshire.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Lightfoot for a survey and plan of the glebe at Wootton, Northamptonshire, amounting to £12 1s 0d.

rows.description: To Plowman. Extra Bill for New Garretts, on the Western side of the Quadrangle No. 9 alteration of the Toger - 10.17.4. New Gates - 13.7.0. Landried
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which provided a significantly more accurate and detailed transcription of the multi-line description including embedded amounts and correct names ('Garretts' not 'Gamblers'). gpt-5-mini's description was heavily summarized and inaccurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to Plowman for extra building works: new garrets on the western side of the quadrangle, alteration of the tower, new gates and related works.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Plowman for extra building works (new garrets, tower alteration, new gates etc.), amounting to £599 1s 2½d.

rows.description: To Rowell. for a Some Piece in the kitchen
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Rowell' and 'Some Piece' (gpt-5-mini read 'Rosell' and 'Time piece').
rows.english_description: Payment to Rowell for a piece/work in the kitchen (kitchen repairs or fitting).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Rowell for a piece/work in the kitchen, amounting to £6 1s 0d.

rows.description: Donation to H. Pardue, on acct. of the Installation Work, & for his journey to the Seaside
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Work' and 'Seaside' (gpt-5-mini read 'week' and 'Isles'). Surname 'Pardue' is a good interpretation from the image.
rows.english_description: Donation to H. Pardue on account of installation-related work and to cover his journey to the seaside.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Donation to H. Pardue for installation work and for his journey to the seaside, amounting to £15 0s 0d.

rows.description: To the Vicar of S. Newington. one Yrs. Int. on 200£ Augmentation
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms main amounts are 8 0 0 and the embedded amount is 200£. gemini-flash accurately extracted both amounts. gpt-5-mini misread the main amounts as 3 8 0 and the embedded amount as 20£.
rows.english_description: Payment to the vicar of South Newington representing one year's interest on a £200 augmentation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the vicar of South Newington representing one year's interest on a £200 augmentation, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.description: Law Expenses, to Mr. Farrar, on acct. of the tent. Qualification, for Mr. Martin paid 44£
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Expenses', 'Mr. Martin', and '44£'. gpt-5-mini's additional '3s' in the embedded amount was not visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Legal fees paid to Mr Farrar concerning the tenths qualification for Mr Martin (includes a payment of £44 noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Legal fees paid to Mr Farrar on account of the tenths qualification for Mr Martin, amounting to £8 10s 4d.

rows.description: Compensation to the Fellows for non-renewal of leases. viz. Gwimear - 1 day. 1833
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Gwimear' (not 'Gwinear') and '1 day.' (not 'in 1 Day.').
rows.english_description: Compensation paid to the fellows for non-renewal of leases (reference to Gwimear, one day, 1833).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Compensation paid to the fellows for non-renewal of leases (Gwimear reference), amounting to £230 0s 0d.

rows.description: Moriety of Merton --- 1 Day. 1834
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Moriety' (gpt-5-mini read 'Morty').
rows.english_description: Payment described as the moriety (share) of Merton for one day in 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment described as the moriety (share) of Merton for one day in 1834, amounting to £250 0s 0d.

rows.description: Do. for one Yrs. Rent of Dry Piece. Whitt.
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Dry Piece' (gpt-5-mini read 'Dwy piece').
rows.english_description: Payment for one year's rent of the 'Dry Piece' at Whitt (follow-on from the previous moriety entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for one year's rent of the Dry Piece at Whitt, amounting to £23 0s 0d.

rows.description: Deficiency in the receipt of Gosford Tithes - from Nicholls. for 4 Yrs. from 1 Day. 1828 to Mich. 1830. inclusive. at 1.14.6. per a
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured '1 Day. 1828' (not 'May 1828') and the embedded amount '1.14.6.' (gpt-5-mini misread as '4.14.6').
rows.english_description: Payment to Nicholls for a deficiency in the receipt of Gosford tithes covering four years from 1 Day 1828 to Michaelmas 1830 inclusive.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Nicholls for a deficiency in the receipt of Gosford tithes for four years (from 1 Day 1828 to Michaelmas 1830 inclusive), amounting to £21 5s 3d.

rows.description: Do. Do. from Solloway. for 2 3/4 Yrs. from 1 Day 1830 to Xtmas. 1832. at 1.14.0
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which provided a more accurate transcription of names ('Solloway' not 'Holloway'), fractional years ('2 3/4 Yrs.' not '23/4 yrs'), and dates ('1 Day 1830' not 'May 1830', 'Xtmas. 1832' not 'March 1832').
rows.english_description: Payment for a deficiency from Solloway covering two and three-quarter years from 1 Day 1830 to Christmas 1832.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for a deficiency from Solloway for 2¾ years (from 1 Day 1830 to Christmas 1832), amounting to £4 13s 6d.

rows.description: Domus Wine Buttles. 3 Lts. to Mids. 1831
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 1 18 0 and description from gemini-flash is accurate ('Domus Wine Buttles. 3 Lts. to Mids. 1831'). gpt-5-mini misread the pounds amount as 7 and several parts of the description.
rows.english_description: Purchase of domestic wine bottles (three litres) up to Midsummer 1831 for the college household.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of domestic wine bottles (3 litres) to Midsummer 1831, amounting to £1 18s 0d.

rows.description: Do. Do. Do. Mich. Do.
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured the three repetitions of 'Do.' (gpt-5-mini only captured two).
rows.english_description: Further domestic wine purchases (parallel entry for Michaelmas period).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Domestic wine purchase (Michaelmas period), amounting to £33 15s 6d.

rows.description: Insurance at Little Tew
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately captured 'Insurance' (singular, not 'Insurances').
rows.english_description: Insurance payment for property at Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Insurance payment for property at Little Tew, amounting to £11 8s 4d.

rows.description: Do. at Yarnton, &c.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amounts are 4 6 0 and description from gemini-flash is accurate ('&c.' singular). gpt-5-mini misread the pounds amount as 7 and added an extra '&c'.
rows.english_description: Insurance payments for Yarnton and other properties.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Insurance payment for Yarnton and other properties, amounting to £4 6s 0d.

rows.description: Total
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms total amount is 1743 7 4½. gemini-flash correctly extracted the total pounds. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as 1173. Description 'Total' is sufficient.
